text:
# Apply to make a conditional order final: Form D36

Use this form to apply to the court for a final order to legally end your marriage or civil partnership.

## Form Content

Case number
Notice of application for a Name of sole applicant or applicant 1
conditional order to be made final
If you made a joint application for the
conditional order, but wish to make a
Name of applicant 2 (joint applications only)
sole application at this stage, you should
complete form D36A instead.
Name of respondent
1. Is it more than 12 months since your conditional order was made?
Yes
No. Go to question 3.
2. Why are you giving notice of this application more than 12 months
since the conditional order was made?
HMCTS USE ONLY
Page 1
D36 Notice of application for a conditional order to be made final (07.24) © Crown Copyright 2024

Sole applicant
This section is to be completed by an applicant who made the
conditional order application solely.
3. This is a sole application, and the applicant applies for the
conditional order made in their favour to be made final.
The date of the conditional order is: Note 3: You will find this
date on the conditional
Day Month Year
order certificate.
Now go to Statement of truth.
Joint applications
This section should be completed by applicants who made the
conditional order application jointly.
4. This is a joint application and we both apply for the conditional
order made in our favour to be made final.
The date of the conditional order is: Note 4: You will find this
date on the conditional
Day Month Year
order certificate.
Page 2
D36 Notice of application for a conditional order to be made final (07.24)
